requestBody.contactName: Parent or contact name. Required. Max 80 characters.
requestBody.phone: Phone number. Required. Allows numbers, spaces, +, parentheses, periods, and dashes. Max 20 characters.
requestBody.preferredDate: Preferred training date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Required. Cannot be in the past.
requestBody.trainingGoals: Optional training goals or notes. Max 600 characters.
requestBody.website: Hidden honeypot spam field. Should be empty if included.
